raw_text:
Green light granted. Execute the first wave exactly as defined.

✅ Approved to proceed (Wave 1)

Agent 1: bd-17s0 (platform/projections scaffolding)

Agent 2: bd-17s1 (platform/audit scaffolding)

Agent 3: bd-17s2 (platform/tenant-registry scaffolding)

Non-negotiable deliverable checklist (each bead)

New crate directory exists

Cargo.toml + src/lib.rs (or main.rs for tools; not applicable here)

Root workspace Cargo.toml members updated

cargo test --workspace passes

No business logic, no migrations, no endpoints

No dependencies on module crates (AR/Payments/Subscriptions/GL/Notifications)

Merge order rule

Merge whichever finishes first, but do not merge if it introduces:

cross-module imports

new heavy deps without justification

CI failures in existing lints/gates

Immediate next wave (unlocked after all 3 merge)

Run these in parallel:

bd-17a0 Projection spine (cursor contract)

bd-17b0 Audit spine (append-only schema + writer API)

bd-17c0 Tenant registry baseline

Proceed.
